race.name: Sovereign to Silver Star
race.tagline: Point to party — forty-two kilometers from Sovereign Lake to Silver Star Village through the Okanagan Highland's high-altitude forests.

vitals.aid_stations: Multiple aid stations along the point-to-point route

climate.description: April at 1,600m elevation in the Okanagan Highland delivers spring skiing conditions. Temperatures range from -5°C to 8°C. Snow is usually corn or spring consolidated. Bright sun and warm afternoons are the norm — sunscreen matters more than wind protection.
challenges: Spring snow conditions — soft, slow corn snow by afternoon
Intense high-altitude UV requires serious sun protection
Course can get slushy in warm years, especially south-facing sections
Late-season snow coverage not always guaranteed for full distance

course.primary: Point-to-point from Sovereign Lake Nordic Centre to Silver Star Village. The route traverses high-altitude plateau terrain through subalpine forest at 1,600m. Rolling terrain with moderate climbing and a festive downhill finish into Silver Star Village.
course.surface: Machine-groomed high-altitude trails through subalpine forest
course.grooming: Sovereign Lake and Silver Star Nordic clubs coordinate grooming — high standard
features: Point-to-point connecting two major BC Nordic centres
High-altitude course at 1,600m — among the highest in Canada
"Point to party" — festive finish at Silver Star Village
Spring skiing atmosphere with sunshine and après culture
Subalpine forest and highland meadow terrain

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: A fun, festive point-to-point at high altitude with a party finish. Limited prestige (founded 2010) and variable late-season snow hold it back. Strong community and scenery scores reflect the atmosphere.
nordic_lab_rating.tier_note: TIER 3 — the party atmosphere and altitude make it distinctive

history.summary: Founded around 2010, Sovereign to Silver Star connects two of British Columbia's premier Nordic ski centres with a point-to-point marathon. The race's tagline — 'Point to party' — captures its spirit: a challenging 42km traverse through high-altitude Okanagan Highland forest followed by a rollicking finish-line celebration in Silver Star Village. The April timing makes it one of the latest-season marathon ski races in North America, embracing spring corn snow and sunshine.
notable_facts: Connects Sovereign Lake and Silver Star — two of BC's top Nordic centres
Tagline: 'Point to party' — finish-line celebration is a major draw
At 1,600m, one of the highest-altitude marathon ski races in Canada
April timing makes it one of the last marathon ski events of the North American season
Capped at 1,200 participants for trail and logistics management
Both Nordic centres are known for exceptional natural snowfall

youtube_data.search_query: Sovereign to Silver Star cross country ski race Vernon

videos.title: Ski Nationals 2020 ~ Sovereign Lake, Vernon BC
videos.description:
Ski Nationals 2020
Sovereign Lake Nordic Club is proud to be hosting the Ski Nationals from March 25 to April 2, 2020. This is Canada’s National Nordic Ski Championships where Canada’s future Olympic athletes compete. It will be an exciting time not only for cross country skiing, but for the City of Vernon itself. https://www.skinationals2020.ca/

videos.title: Canadian Beijing Prep Camp, Sovereign Lake/SilverStar
videos.description: The team did some sprint practice today. Four prologues instead of heats to comply with the Covid protocols and keep everyone safe and healthy. The course was designed to replicate the Beijing sprint loop profile and is at 1660m elevation.

videos.title: Men's Nordiq Cup/SuperTour 10km mass start at Sovereign Lake
videos.description: The men's field at the top of the second A climb on the first lap of the 2022 Nordiq Cup/SuperTour 10km at Sovereign Lake. The temperature was -18C all day, resulting in squeaky but fairly fast snow. December 1, 2022.

videos.description: Canadian Jesse Cockey (AWCA) and American Sylvan Ellefson (Homegrown) talk about a challenging 15 k classic individual start at the NorAm opener at Sovereign Lake in Vernon, British Columbia.

videos.title: Nordic skiing at Silverstar Mountain Resort, BC
videos.description: Nordic skiing at Silverstar near Vernon BC Canada, is one of Canada's premier cross-country destinations. This video showcases that experience and what awaits.

videos.title: Best Moments of Sovereign 2 SilverStar Ski Marathon - Skate 2023
videos.description:
The Ski Classics Challengers event Sovereign 2 SilverStar Ski Marathon - Skate took place last weekend with a 40km long-distance race in freestyle technique in Vernon, Canada. 

You can enjoy the event highlights from day 1.

Video Credits: SilverStar Mountain Resort/Sovereign2SilverStar Ski Marathon
videos.curation_reason: Recent race coverage showing highlights from the actual Sovereign to SilverStar event in skate technique.

videos.title: Go Pro Hero 2 Test - 121124_SovereignLake
videos.description: Go Pro Hero 2 Test at Sovereign Lake Nordic Club near Vernon, BC, Canada.  I was using free style (skating) cross country ski and had camera on my head which is why it is quite shaky.  It is hard to determine where I am actually filming with this devise.  It will be better with downhill ski for sure.  Thanks Miyuki for modeling. ;-)

videos.title: Sovereign to SilverStar Loppet 2023
videos.description:
The S2S Loppet is a fantastic 2 day even that has a 20km and 42km (Free and Classic) style the first weekend of April.  Amazing XC ski trails with rolling hills and twisty turns.

A very well organized and executed event with amazing energy and volunteers. To learn more about the event please visit https://www.sovereign2silverstar.com/home
